description: A year of hypertrophy for the intermediate lifter who wants to actually finish a long program. Five days a week across a Push/Pull/Legs/Upper/Lower split, with three phases progressing from foundation building, to a strength-hypertrophy crossover, to a high-volume metabolic finisher. Exercises rotate every block while volume per muscle stays constant — the stimulus keeps changing, the dose doesn't drop.
